name: CRISPR Guide And Cloning Workflow
description: Runs the full local CRISPR workflow for a target sequence: first calls the PAM-density Cas selector to choose Cas9 or Cas12a, then designs the matching guide, verifies the protospacer against a local downloaded reference when supplied, and returns cloning oligos plus construction_file_inputs. Use this when the user asks for guide design and cloning oligos without explicitly specifying Cas9 or Cas12a.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: Target DNA sequence to analyze. Accepts a resource name such as ecoli_rpsl, a raw sequence string, FASTA content, or GenBank content. The MCP framework resolves this to a clean DNA sequence before execution.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Optional organism alias used for target verification and vector defaults, such as e_coli.

inputs.name: target_reference
inputs.description: Optional explicit local reference name used to verify the selected protospacer. Supported value is ecoli_rpsl.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Optional vector override. If omitted, local references choose defaults when available: ecoli_rpsl uses pcrispr.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional final construct name to include in construction_file_inputs.

outputs.description: A workflow result containing cas_selection, selected_cas, guide_design, protospacer, pam_site, cloning_oligos, target_verification, top_oligo, bottom_oligo, and construction_file_inputs.
